ddls:
CREATE TABLE "offers" (
  "offer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offer */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign the offer belongs to */,
  "varietal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wine varietal */,
  "min_qty" REAL /* Minimum quantity required for the offer (in kg) */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount percentage for the offer */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Origin of the wine */,
  "past_peak" INTEGER /* Whether the offer is past its peak sales period */,
  "price" REAL /* Base price of the wine per unit */,
  "vat_rate" REAL /* VAT rate applicable to the wine */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the wine */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the wine offer */,
  "stock_threshold" REAL /* Minimum stock level below which a warning is triggered */,
  "active" INTEGER /* A boolean flag to indicate if the offer is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offers_varietal_id FOREIGN KEY ("varietal_id") REFERENCES varietals ("varietal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offers_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "target_sales" REAL /* Target sales volume for the campaign */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the campaign (e.g., planning, active, completed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "varietals" (
  "varietal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each varietal */,
  "varietal_name" TEXT /* Name of the varietal (e.g., Malbec, Pinot Noir) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the varietal */,
  "grape_type" TEXT /* Type of grape used in the varietal */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the varietal is commonly produced */,
  "alcohol_content" REAL /* Typical alcohol content of the varietal */,
  "tasting_notes" TEXT /* Tasting notes or flavor profile of the varietal */,
  "food_pairing" TEXT /* Suggested food pairings for the varietal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("varietal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "origins" (
  "origin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each origin */,
  "origin_name" TEXT /* Name of the origin (e.g., France, Oregon) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the origin */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Climate of the origin */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil in the origin */,
  "winemaking_techniques" TEXT /* Common winemaking techniques used in the origin */,
  "history" TEXT /* Historical background of wine production in the origin */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the origin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("origin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "offer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the offer the inventory belongs to */,
  "qty" REAL /* Quantity of the wine in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  "reorder_level" REAL /* Stock level at which a reorder is triggered */,
  "last_reorder_date" TEXT /* Date of the last reorder */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier for the inventory */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for restocking the inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_offer_id FOREIGN KEY ("offer_id") REFERENCES offers ("offer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the customer is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the customer is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer's address */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the customer is located */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the customer joined */,
  "preferred_varietal_id" INTEGER /* Customer's preferred wine varietal */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Number of loyalty points the customer has earned */,
  "is_subscribed" INTEGER /* A boolean flag to indicate if the customer is subscribed to the newsletter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_preferred_varietal_id FOREIGN KEY ("preferred_varietal_id") REFERENCES varietals ("varietal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method used for shipping the order */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping the order */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the order */,
  "discount_code" TEXT /* Discount code applied to the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "offer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the offer the item is for */,
  "qty" REAL /* Quantity of the item in the order */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the item in the order */,
  "discount_applied" REAL /* Discount applied to the item */,
  "tax_applied" REAL /* Tax applied to the item */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the item including tax and discount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_offer_id FOREIGN KEY ("offer_id") REFERENCES offers ("offer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the payment is for */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment status */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Amount refunded, if any */,
  "is_refunded" INTEGER /* A boolean flag to indicate if the payment has been refunded */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the payment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., pending, completed, cancelled) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_status_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment the update is for */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the status the payment was updated to */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the payment status was updated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who updated the payment status */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the status update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_status_updates_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES payment_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_status_updates_payment_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_id") REFERENCES payments ("payment_id")
)
